name: tidal-microplastic-flux
must_detect_signals: CITATION.cff present with title, authors, abstract, and a DOI field
a computational notebook (analysis.ipynb) reproduces a headline figure
a dataset note (data/DATASET.md) describes provenance, schema, and license
results/ holds a reproducible figure/table tied to the abstract's claim
no installable package or CLI — it is a reproducibility artifact, not software
expected_visual: a results table/figure reference and the citation block; not an ASCII banner
notes: Detection must not mistake the Python notebook for a library. The research README leads with the abstract/result, how to reproduce it, the dataset, and the citation; G7 (results/credibility), G1 (abstract), and G6 (citations/links) carry the most weight.
